title: AIF Holdings Services is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Junior)

jsonLd.title: AIF Holdings Services is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Junior)
jsonLd.description:
Join the AIF Holdings Services family as a Subject Matter Expert in Kanpur. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About AIF Holdings Services:
AIF Holdings Services is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Support students with special educational needs
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in E-learning
• Proficiency in Mentoring
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in Child Psychology
• Proficiency in Educational Technology
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Learning & development budget
• Annual performance appraisal
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Kanpur, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with AIF Holdings Services!
